nodes.label: Qdrant Vector Store Implementation  Vector store using Qdrant - production-rea
Qdrant implementation of VectorStore.          Requires:     - Qdrant server
Get full collection name with prefix.
Create a new collection in Qdrant.                  Args:             collect
Insert or update vectors in Qdrant.                  Args:             collec
Search for similar vectors in Qdrant.                  Args:             coll
Batch upsert vectors.                  Args:             collection_name: Nam
